compass.def: 指南針、圓規、羅盤、範圍、包圍的人的人的人物 (單數)
compass.col: magnetic compass, points of the compass, within the compass of
compass.ex: The magnetic compass needle always points north.

compassion.def: 同情心、憐憫的人物 (單數)
compassion.ex: The nurse showed great compassion to her patients.

compassionate.def: 有同情心的、憐憫的人的人物
compassionate.ex: He was granted compassionate leave to visit family.

compatriot.def: 同國人、同胞的人物 (單數)
compatriot.ex: He met a fellow compatriot in the foreign city.

compel.def: 強迫、驅使、迫使的人的人
compel.ex: Hunger will compel the animals to find food today.

compelling.def: 強大的、引人入勝的人 (或物)
compelling.ex: The police had compelling evidence against him.

compendious.def: 簡潔的、扼要的人的人物
compendious.ex: The book gave a compendious account of history.

compendium.def: 摘要、綱要、概略的人物 (單數)
compendium.ex: The historical compendium covered all major wars.

compensate.ex: We will compensate you for the travel expenses.

compensation.def: 補償金、賠償的人物 (單數)
compensation.ex: The workers are seeking fair compensation today.

compensatory.def: 補償的、報酬的人的人物
compensatory.ex: The law includes several compensatory measures.

compere.def: (電視、廣播)節目主持人人物 (單數)
compere.ex: The famed compere introduced the first guest.

compete.ex: Local shops find it hard to compete with giants.

competence/competency.def: 能力、勝任、效能的人物 (單數)
competence/competency.ex: The job requires high professional competence.

competent.def: 勝任的、有能力的人的人物
competent.ex: She is a highly competent and skilled manager.

competently.ex: He dealt competently with all the customers.

competition.def: 競爭、對手、比賽的人物 (單數)
competition.ex: Stiff competition from rivals lowered the prices.

competitive.def: 競爭的、有競爭力的人的人物
competitive.ex: The firm offers a very competitive monthly salary.

competitiveness.def: 競爭力、競爭的人物 (單數)
competitiveness.ex: Innovation is vital for global competitiveness.

competitor.ex: Their main competitor has just launched a site.

compilation.def: 編纂、編輯物、選輯的人物 (單數)
compilation.ex: The band released a new best-of compilation.

compile.def: 彙整、編輯、編譯的人的人
compile.ex: They spent hours to compile the user data today.

compiler.def: 編輯者、(計)編譯器的人物 (單數)
compiler.ex: The swift compiler translated the code quickly.

complacency/complacence.def: 自滿、自鳴得意的人物 (單數)
complacency/complacence.ex: There is no room for complacency in this race.

complacent.def: 自滿的、自鳴得意的人的人物
complacent.ex: We must not become complacent about safety.

complain.def: 抱怨、發牢騷、抗議的人的人
complain.ex: Customers began to complain about slow service.

complainant.def: 原告、控訴者的人物 (單數)
complainant.ex: The legal complainant gave her statement today.

complainer.ex: He is a constant complainer about everything.

complaining.ex: Please stop complaining and start working now.

complaint.def: 抱怨、控狀、疾病、牢騷的人物 (單數)
complaint.col: make a complaint, formal complaint, file a complaint
complaint.ex: She decided to file a formal complaint today.

complaisance.ex: His natural complaisance made him very popular.

complement.def: 補足、配對、補足語、補的人的人的人物
complement.ex: The new tie is a perfect complement to shirt.

complementary.def: 補充的、互補的人的人物
complementary.ex: They offer regular complementary therapies here.

complete.def: 完整的、完成、徹底的的人的人的人物
complete.col: complete set, complete with, complete stranger
complete.ex: She has a near complete set of ancient coins.

completed.def: 完成了的、完美的的人的人 (或物)
completed.ex: Please return the completed form by tomorrow.

completely.ex: The initial plan failed completely tonight.

completeness.ex: The data lacks absolute completeness tonight.

completion.def: 完成、結束、結案的人物 (單數)
completion.ex: The massive new bridge is near completion now.

complex.def: 複雜的、建築群、綜合體的人的人物 (雜)
complex.col: housing complex, inferiority complex, complex problem
complex.ex: She suffers from an inferiority complex today.

complexion.def: 膚色、面色、性質的人物 (單數)
complexion.ex: The dark complexion of father was very striking.

complexity.def: 複雜性、複雜的人物 (單數)
complexity.ex: The problem has an added complexity tonight.

compliance.def: 承諾、答應、順從、遵守的人物 (單數)
compliance.ex: The building is in full compliance with laws.

compliant.def: 順従的、遵守的人的人物 (順)
compliant.ex: The machine is fully compliant with safety rules.

complicate.def: 使複雜化、使混亂的人的人
complicate.ex: Please don't complicate the matter further now.

complicated.def: 複雜的、難懂的人的人 (或物)
complicated.ex: That was a highly complicated and long process.

complication.def: 併發症、糾紛、複雜的人物 (單數)
complication.ex: The surgery suffered a medical complication today.

complicity.ex: There was evidence of complicity in the theft.

compliment.def: 讚揚、讚美、致意的人的人人物 (單數)
compliment.col: pay a compliment, backhanded compliment, return the compliment
compliment.ex: He paid her a very nice compliment on her dress.

complimentary.def: 讚美的、免費的人的人物 (贈)
complimentary.ex: She received two complimentary tickets for show.

comply.def: 遵守、服從、照做的人的人
comply.ex: You must comply with the local safety rules now.

component.def: 成分、零件、組成的人的人物 (單數)
component.ex: Electronic components were imported from Japan.

comport.def: 舉止、表現、相稱的人的人
comport.ex: You must comport yourself with dignity tonight.

comportment.ex: His steady comportment impressed the manager.

compose.def: 組成、寫作、構圖、使鎮靜的人的人
compose.ex: The team is composed of ten skilled experts.

composed.def: 鎮靜的、組成的的人的人 (或物)
composed.ex: She remained calm and composed during surgery.

composer.def: 作曲家、創作者人物 (單數)
composer.ex: The famous composer wrote many great symphonies.

composite.def: 合成的、複合的人的人物 (單數)
composite.ex: The plane is made of strong composite material.

composition.def: 作文、成分、構圖、合成物人物 (單數)
composition.ex: His musical composition was truly masterpiece.

compositor.ex: The skilled compositor worked in the print shop.

compost.ex: Use garden compost to help the vegetables grow.

composure.ex: He struggled to regain his composure after news.

compound.def: 化合物、複合物、複合的、妥協、增加的人的人的人物
compound.col: chemical compound, military compound, compound interest
compound.ex: The chemical compound was highly toxic and blue.

comprehend.def: 理解、領會、包含的人的人
comprehend.ex: I fail to comprehend why he made that choice.

comprehensible.ex: The lesson was easily comprehensible for all.

comprehension.def: 理解(力)、包含的人物 (單數)
comprehension.ex: His cruel actions were truly beyond comprehension.

comprehensive.def: 詳細的、綜合的人的人物 (詳)
comprehensive.ex: They conducted a comprehensive study of market.

comprehensively.ex: The issue was dealt comprehensively by board.

compress.def: 壓縮、精簡、壓平的人的人人物 (單數)
compress.ex: Apply a cold compress to the swollen area now.

compressible.ex: The gas is highly compressible under pressure.

compression.ex: Data compression helps to save storage space.

compressor.def: 壓縮機、壓迫者的人物 (單數)
compressor.ex: They used a large air compressor for the tools.

comprise.ex: The test will comprise of fifty multiple questions.

compromise.def: 妥協、讓步、損害的人的人人物 (單數)
compromise.col: reach a compromise, make a compromise
compromise.ex: They managed to reach a fair compromise today.

compromising.def: 損害名譽的、妥協的人 (或物)
compromising.ex: He was found in a very compromising situation.

compulsion.def: 強迫、強制、衝動的人物 (單數)
compulsion.ex: I felt an absolute compulsion to check phone.

compulsive.def: 強迫性的、著迷的人的人物
compulsive.ex: He is a compulsive gambler who lost everything.

compulsively.ex: She checked her watch compulsively all night.

compulsory.def: 義務的、強制的人的人物 (必)
compulsory.ex: Basic military service is compulsory in the city.
